channel.title: WelovetheNHS on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in WelovetheNHS on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 3286921454
item.description:
FREE: care for, chronic, acute, accidents, incidents, terminal, trivial, pandemic, mental, physical and emotional. That’s why #welovetheNHS

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 3285871700
item.description:
#welovetheNHS - debt, pain or death seems to be choice in US. Odd that the state will pay for war, car and bank bailouts, but not health.

❤️ 1 | 🔃 0
